---
name: Component or feature proposal
about: Propose a new component, variant, or token
labels: proposal
---

**Problem**
What can't be built cleanly with the current 105 components?

**Proposal**
Sketch the API: props, variants, states. Reference prior art if any.

**Scope check**
- [ ] Not achievable by composing existing components
- [ ] Fits an existing group (forms/display/ai/code/…) — which?
- [ ] Works with semantic tokens only (light + dark + compact for free)
